description:
A practical ballistic calculator for precision rifle shooting.
Quickly calculate a ballistic solution for any conditions. Features:
- Conveniently manage rifles, optics, and ammunition
- Upload & calibrate custom SVG reticles
- GPS & online weather integration
- Fast ballistic solving: G1/G7 drag models, spin effects, coriolis effect
- Themes: Light, Dark, OLED Black
- Tablet & foldable support
